observacoes: Honors the civil rights leader Martin Luther King Jr.
Honors all U.S. presidents, particularly Washington and Lincoln.
Honors military personnel who died in service.
Celebrates the Declaration of Independence in 1776.
Commemorates Christopher Columbus's arrival in the Americas.
Honors military veterans who served in the U.S. Armed Forces.
National day of thanksgiving and harvest celebration.
Celebrates the birth of Jesus Christ.
